text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
145 
ICL_APPLY 
LABEL: 
How Part D Initial Coverage Limit (ICL) is Applied in the Part D Plan 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether Part D plan applies the Medicare-defined Part D ICL amount. 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
1 = Medicare-defined Amount 
2 = Plan-defined Amount 
3 = No ICL 
COMMENT: 
The Initial Coverage Limit (ICL) phase
